commit.subject: LU-16938 revert: utils: setstripe overstripe multiple OST count"
commit.message:
LU-16938 revert: utils: setstripe overstripe multiple OST count"

This reverts commit 1a6ef725c285dd5c25c976956ba754dc470f6c1c.
The patch changes the internal representation of the stripe
count, which breaks interoperability with older clients/servers.

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-flr serverversion=2.14
Change-Id: I4e31397fb7c6208978579132c27b602e31559e30
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
